title: Prince Edward Island - 2025 Income tax package - Canada.ca
content:
## Prince Edward Island - 2025 Income tax package
You may be looking for:
- Filing a paper tax return
- Filing a return with tax software
If you are filing a return with tax software, you do not have to get the income tax package. Use the income tax package only if you are filing a paper return or need tax forms or schedules.

## Using the income tax package
The tax package includes both the federal tax return and the provincial form , as well as other forms and schedules that may apply to you.
- Download or view your return and provincial forms Federal tax Income Tax and Benefit Return This is the main form you need to complete your taxes Prince Edward Island tax Form PE428 - Prince Edward Island Tax Calculate the Prince Edward Island tax and credits to report on your return If you received business income from outside Prince Edward Island If you resided in Prince Edward Island on December 31, 2025 (or the date you left Canada if you emigrated in 2025) and all or part of your 2025 business income was earned and can be allocated to a permanent establishment outside Prince Edward Island, use Form T2203, Provincial and Territorial Taxes for Multiple Jurisdictions instead of Form PE428. Information and worksheets to help complete your federal return and provincial form Federal tax Federal income tax and benefit information Find out what's new for 2025 and get help completing your federal return Federal Worksheet Use this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts to report on your return Prince Edward Island tax Prince Edward Island Tax Information Find out what's new for residents of Prince Edward Island for 2025 and get help completing your Prince Edward Island tax and credits form Worksheet PE428 - Prince Edward Island Calculate some of the amounts to report on your Prince Edward Island tax and credits form

### Download or view your return and provincial forms
- Income Tax and Benefit Return This is the main form you need to complete your taxes

#### Prince Edward Island tax
- Form PE428 - Prince Edward Island Tax Calculate the Prince Edward Island tax and credits to report on your return If you received business income from outside Prince Edward Island If you resided in Prince Edward Island on December 31, 2025 (or the date you left Canada if you emigrated in 2025) and all or part of your 2025 business income was earned and can be allocated to a permanent establishment outside Prince Edward Island, use Form T2203, Provincial and Territorial Taxes for Multiple Jurisdictions instead of Form PE428.
If you resided in Prince Edward Island on December 31, 2025 (or the date you left Canada if you emigrated in 2025) and all or part of your 2025 business income was earned and can be allocated to a permanent establishment outside Prince Edward Island, use Form T2203, Provincial and Territorial Taxes for Multiple Jurisdictions instead of Form PE428.
- Federal income tax and benefit information Find out what's new for 2025 and get help completing your federal return
- Federal Worksheet Use this worksheet to calculate some of the amounts to report on your return
- Prince Edward Island Tax Information Find out what's new for residents of Prince Edward Island for 2025 and get help completing your Prince Edward Island tax and credits form
- Worksheet PE428 - Prince Edward Island Calculate some of the amounts to report on your Prince Edward Island tax and credits form
- Choose other forms and schedules that may apply Depending on your tax situation, you may need additional forms, schedules, or publications to help complete your tax return . Federal Schedule 2 - Federal Amounts Transferred from your Spouse or Common-Law Partner Schedule 3 - Capital Gains (or Losses) Schedule 5 - Amounts for Spouse or Common-Law Partner and Dependants Schedule 6 - Canada Workers Benefit Schedule 7 - RRSP, PRPP and SPP Unused Contributions, Transfers, and HBP or LLP Activities Schedule 8 - Canada Pension Plan Contributions and Overpayment Schedule 9 - Donations and Gifts Schedule 11 - Federal Tuition Amount and Canada Training Credit Schedule 12 - Multigenerational Home Renovation Tax Credit Schedule 13 - Employment Insurance Premiums on Self-Employment and Other Eligible Earnings Schedule 15 - FHSA Contributions, Transfers and Activities Prince Edward Island Schedule PE(S2) - Provincial Amounts Transferred From Your Spouse or Common-Law Partner Schedule PE(S11) - Prince Edward Island Tuition and Education Amounts

### Choose other forms and schedules that may apply
Depending on your tax situation, you may need additional forms, schedules, or publications to help complete your tax return .
- Schedule 2 - Federal Amounts Transferred from your Spouse or Common-Law Partner
- Schedule 3 - Capital Gains (or Losses)
- Schedule 5 - Amounts for Spouse or Common-Law Partner and Dependants
- Schedule 6 - Canada Workers Benefit
- Schedule 7 - RRSP, PRPP and SPP Unused Contributions, Transfers, and HBP or LLP Activities
- Schedule 8 - Canada Pension Plan Contributions and Overpayment
- Schedule 9 - Donations and Gifts
- Schedule 11 - Federal Tuition Amount and Canada Training Credit
- Schedule 12 - Multigenerational Home Renovation Tax Credit
- Schedule 13 - Employment Insurance Premiums on Self-Employment and Other Eligible Earnings
- Schedule 15 - FHSA Contributions, Transfers and Activities

#### Prince Edward Island
- Schedule PE(S2) - Provincial Amounts Transferred From Your Spouse or Common-Law Partner
- Schedule PE(S11) - Prince Edward Island Tuition and Education Amounts

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
